title: Australian Parmigiano Crusted Gooey Stir Fry
description: A unique stir fry dish featuring a gooey center, topped with a crispy Australian Parmigiano crust. Enjoy the combination of savory flavors and textures in this creative recipe.

ingredients.name: Stir Fry Vegetables
ingredients.notes: Your choice of vegetables (e.g., bell peppers, carrots, broccoli)

instructions: In a bowl, mix together the softened Gooey and Australian Parmigiano until well combined.
Add the Reggiano to the bowl and mix until a crumbly mixture forms.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the stir fry vegetables to the skillet and cook until tender.
Form the Gooey mixture into a ball and place it on top of the vegetables.
Sprinkle the crumbly mixture evenly over the Gooey.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 10-12 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the skillet from the oven and season with salt and pepper to taste.
